source_request.historical_image_policy: Do not reuse or redraw earlier v03/v04 faction flag sheets. Build new image prompts and new reference images from the design brief.
source_request.current_image_policy: Active references use stable unversioned PNG paths under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/. When a current image is replaced, archive the old image under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/history/ with an _vNN filename before overwriting the stable current path.
source_request.delivery_rule: Each faction emblem is one standalone current image with a stable unversioned output path.

shared_generation_rules.format: single square emblem image, centered composition, isolated on transparent or clean neutral background
shared_generation_rules.style: high-end fantasy production concept art, readable heraldic silhouette, aged material detail, practical asset reference, no mockup board
must_have: no text, no captions, no letters, no watermark
no flag sheet, no multi-panel layout, no character portrait
usable as a public art reference for later ComfyUI or in-game asset generation
shared_generation_rules.negative_prompt: text, caption, letters, watermark, UI labels, multi-panel sheet, repeated logos, modern national flag, photorealistic object mockup, character face, busy background, tiny unreadable symbol

prompts.design_lock: The existing Zhaoming sun-and-moon emblem direction is approved; preserve the core identity while making a fresh standalone emblem image.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one standalone square faction emblem for the Zhaoming Empire. Centered old imperial sun disk made of weathered vermilion enamel and dull antique gold, with a clean moon-white crescent or moon arc nested inside the sun, readable from far away. The emblem should feel like an ancient state seal recovered from a burned frontier archive: rigid imperial symmetry, restrained authority, scorched lacquer edges, engraved gold rim, small radial sun rays integrated into the badge, subtle ash and patina. No text, no flag fabric, no board layout, no extra emblems. High-end fantasy heraldry concept art, crisp silhouette, practical production reference, neutral dark warm background or transparent-looking clean background.
prompts.negative_prompt: text, Chinese characters, letters, watermark, multiple flags, insects, skull mascot, modern logo, cluttered background, full banner, character portrait

prompts.design_lock: The outer insect form must be smaller and subordinate. The black sun must visibly bleed into the white halo, with black overflow inside the white glow.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one standalone square faction emblem for the Suming State and Qingming Court. The core is a black eclipsed sun surrounded by a cold white halo. Inside the white halo, black ink-like seepage, thorny cracks, and soot overflow visibly contaminate the white glow. A pale white wing or moth-wing geometry covers part of the black sun like a surgical seal, elegant but ominous. The outer insect motif must be small, thin, and subordinate: only a delicate rim of chitin legs, antenna arcs, or segmented shell hints, never a huge bug surrounding the whole emblem. Mood: bureaucratic purity corrupted by occult eclipse, icy white, black lacquer, faint bone silver, restrained palace ritual. No text, no flag fabric, no board layout, no giant insect. High-end fantasy heraldic asset reference, crisp silhouette, centered composition, clean neutral background.
prompts.negative_prompt: giant insect, big beetle body, cute moth, readable text, Chinese characters, flag sheet, multiple symbols, bright cartoon colors, character portrait, too much background

prompts.design_lock: Interpret the user's 'wanshou chess' wording as a public emblem direction for the Wanshou banner/alliance mark: many beast tribes, not one animal mascot.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one standalone square faction emblem for the Northern Beastfolk Tribal Alliance, the Wanshou banner mark. It must represent many beast clans united, not a single animal mascot. Build a ritual totem medallion from interlocked animal signs: wolf ears, bear claw notches, elk antlers, ram horn arcs, raven feather cuts, boar tusk crescents, and bone bead knots arranged around a central northern fire or ice-blue spirit flame. Use hide cord, bone gold, dark iron, ash black, muted aurora green, and cold blue highlights. The silhouette should read as a fierce tribal alliance seal: rough-carved, portable, oath-bound, suitable for stamping banners, shields, and war drums. No text, no flag sheet, no character portrait, no single dominant animal head. High-end fantasy heraldry concept art, centered clean square emblem, neutral dark snowy background or transparent-looking clean background.
prompts.negative_prompt: single wolf head only, single lion mascot, chessboard, game pieces, text, Chinese characters, flag sheet, multi-panel board, cute animal, modern sports logo, cluttered scenic background
